title: erodium cicutarium var. pilosum
intro: Erodium cicutarium var. pilosum, also known as redstem storksbill or hairy-stemmed storksbill, is a plant species within the geranium family (Geraniaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Erodium cicutarium var. pilosum include relief from urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic to treat wounds and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
